title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Unable to embrace Tanuja's deception, Rishi chooses alcohol to entice him to peace. Subsequently, Manpreet advocates Tanuja, but Rishi leaves in gloom without batting an eye on Manpreet's plea to understand Tanuja.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Rishi hands the divorce papers to Tanuja and asks her to sign them. Being insulted by everyone in the family, Tanuja asks Rishi if he really wants to go through with the divorce. Shocked with his approval, Tanuja signs the papers.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
